conversation_history.content: Hello! I can help you with loan eligibility. Could you please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure (in years or months)?
income -50000, emi 30k, down payment 8 lakh, 5 years
It seems that the Monthly Income you provided is negative, which is not valid. Could you please provide a positive Monthly Income along with your Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure?
I need a bit more information to assist you. Could you please provide your Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure (in years or months) along with your Monthly Income?
